description: A financial statement outlining the performance, contract value, and distribution details of an annuity investment account.

first_name.instruction: First name of the annuity payment recipient.

middle_name.instruction: Middle name of the annuity payment recipient.

last_name.instruction: Last name of the annuity payment recipient.

recipient_ssn.instruction: Social Security Number of the recipient. Reformat as XXX-XX-XXXX.

recipient_state.instruction: State of the recipient. Two-letter code.

contract_number.instruction: The unique contract, policy, or account number identifying the annuity.

payer_name.instruction: Name of the insurance company or financial institution issuing the annuity.

payer_ein.instruction: Employer Identification Number of the payer.

payment_amount.instruction: Gross annuity payment amount per period.

payment_frequency.instruction: How often payments are made (monthly, quarterly, annually).

annuity_start_date.instruction: Date annuity payments began. YYYY-MM-DD format.

tax_year.instruction: Tax year the annuity income is reported for.

taxable_amount.instruction: Taxable portion of the annuity distribution.

federal_tax_withheld.instruction: Federal income tax withheld from annuity payments.

current_contract_value.instruction: The total ending monetary value of the annuity contract for the current period, often labeled Ending Value or Account Balance.

document_date.instruction: Date the statement or form was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.
